TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O rakat a malinah notimolan kanatal a sowal no finacadan == O yincuminco no Taywan, sasowalen itini i 17 sici eca ho cimalinahay ko sa'etal lilisay no riyar i Congkuo i 'ayaw, iraay to ko tamdaw maro' itini i Taywan ato tamdaw no ngataay kanatal. Saka o ponka ato sowal o nano notimolan kanatal sowal (Astronesian) caira, imatiniay sifo misetek to nia finacadan ira ko 16 finacadan, halo 'Amis, Atayal, Bunun, Paiwan, Puyuma, Rukai, Saisiyat, Thao, Tsou, Yami , Truku, Kacalan, Sakizaya, Seediq, Hla'alua, Kanakanavu, no Mancin a to'ek o "Hoan" han ko pitahidang, no Dipong a picalap mikowan itiya o Takasako (Takasago) sanay, tayni to ko Kominto a sifo pangangan saan to yincumin i o "Santi-sanpaw/Pinti-sanpaw" sanay pitahidang, onini saheto o piepec pisiiked a pinengneng no itiyaay a mikowan, ikor no 1994 (83) mihecaan pakayni pisa'icel no kapah to syakay onto no yincumin, itiya to mapalasawad ko pisawaco, oya sanpaw sanay mafalic to o "yincumin" a han to ko pitahidang, ta o "Yincuminco" han to ko pitahidang. O notimolan kanatal a sowal no finacadan o kasakilac itini i Taypinyang ato Intuyang ato Asiya a malitosaay kanatal (Tenok timol kanatal ato Malaty kanatal) a finacadan, oya dadahalay riyar ato kanatal paka'amis o Taywan, pakatimol o New Zealand, pakawali tangasa notimolan Amilika kaetip a Easter kanatal, pakaetip kawali no Africa a Madagascar kanatal, tatenokan o Philippines, Malaysia, Indonesia, New Guinea a kanatal, mika awaay ko Australia, o sadadahalay ko kasakilac a finacadan, polong no tamdaw salongan ira ko 3 walwalan no tamdaw, nika 'alomanay masa'opo itini i kawali katimol Asiya sa'etal. Notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan kakahad ko kaledef no sa'etal, kasasiroma no palapatan ato masa patekay to ko mihecaan no likisi masasiroma, ira to ko masasitekeday, kadofahay kasairaira a ponka no notimolan kanatal a sowal no finacadan. Midotoc to mikingkiway hakasi to no tamdamdaw, notimolan kanatal a sowal no finacadan a ponka malacaday a salongan, halo patakaray to loma' ato i seraay, miliyas to kaso'emet ato 'oner a fao, o mifalaway ko kamaomah, hali'icep, mafana' a mitinooay, miwikwik ato mi'adop mifoting no to'asan. Notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan i Taywan masakilac i paka'amisay, ira ko sakafana' to pahapinang nangra to notimolay kanatal a finacadan, ngalef o sakafiyaway a 'etal, masapatekay mihecaan oya to ko kacacofeliw, caay ko mahawitiday a finacadan. Imatiniay a kanatal no Taywan (halo Lanyu) a yincuminco a tamdaw salongan ira ko 54 'ofad no tamdaw, dengan o 0.002% a notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan ko tamdaw, nika midotoc to adihayay mikingkiwan mahapinang, o kaliwasakan pasayra i timolan malinah ko rakat o naitiniay i Taywan ko lalowadan a lalengawan, o rakat a malinah no katelangay notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan kaliwasakan pasayra i timolan malinah ko rakat, kacitodongan kaitiraan a maro'. Anini romaroma a notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan sa'etal macacorok no Muslim, Kristokiw, Tingsokiw a serareci ko kafiyol, nanoyaan o yincuminco no Taywan cimirocokay ato mirayrayay to serayan lekakawa a ponka no finacadan.
S.PHON: == o~u rakat a maɾinaħ no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan == o~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u no~u tajwan, saso~uwaɾən itini i ** siʦi əʦa ħo~u ʦimaɾinaħaj ko~u saʡətaɾ ɾiɾisaj no~u rijar i ʦo~uŋko~u~uo~u i ʡajaw, iraaj to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡ itini i tajwan ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ŋataaj kanataɾ. saka o~u po~unka ato~u so~uwaɾ o~u nano~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ (astro~unəsian) ʦaira, imatiniaj sifo~u misətək to~u nia finaʦaɬ~ɮan ira ko~u ** finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ħaɾo~u ʡamis, atajaɾ, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, paiwan, po~u~ujo~u~uma, ro~u~ukai, saisijat, tħao~u, tso~uo~u~u, jami , tro~u~uko~u~u, kaʦaɾan, saki*aja, səəɬ~ɮi*, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua, kanakanab~vo~u~u, no~u manʦin a to~uʡək o~u "ħo~uan" ħan ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a piʦaɾap miko~uwan itija o~u takasako~u (takasa*o~u) sanaj, tajni to~u ko~u ko~uminto~u a sifo~u paŋaŋan saan to~u jinʦo~u~umin i o~u "santi-sanpaw/pinti-sanpaw" sanaj pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, o~unini saħəto~u o~u piəpəʦ pisiikəɬ~ɮ a pinəŋnəŋ no~u itijaaj a miko~uwan, iko~ur no~u **** (**) miħəʦaan pakajni pisaʡiʦəɾ no~u kapaħ to~u sjakaj o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin, itija to~u mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u pisawaʦo~u, o~uja sanpaw sanaj mafaɾiʦ to~u o~u "jinʦo~u~umin" a ħan to~u ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, ta o~u "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u" ħan to~u ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ. o~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u kasakiɾaʦ itini i tajpinjaŋ ato~u into~u~ujaŋ ato~u asija a maɾito~usaaj kanataɾ (təno~uk timo~uɾ kanataɾ ato~u maɾatj kanataɾ) a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~uja ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaj rijar ato~u kanataɾ pakaʡamis o~u tajwan, pakatimo~uɾ o~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, pakawaɾi taŋasa no~utimo~uɾan amiɾika kaətip a əastər kanataɾ, pakaətip kawaɾi no~u afriʦa a maɬ~ɮa*asʦar kanataɾ, tatəno~ukan o~u pħiɾippinəs, maɾajsia, inɬ~ɮo~unəsia, nəw *o~u~uinəa a kanataɾ, mika awaaj ko~u ao~u~ustraɾia, o~u saɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaj ko~u kasakiɾaʦ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u * waɾwaɾan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, nika ʡaɾo~umanaj masaʡo~upo~u itini i kawaɾi katimo~uɾ asija saʡətaɾ. no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan kakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaɾəɬ~ɮəf no~u saʡətaɾ, kasasiro~uma no~u paɾapatan ato~u masa patəkaj to~u ko~u miħəʦaan no~u ɾikisi masasiro~uma, ira to~u ko~u masasitəkəɬ~ɮaj, kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħaj kasairaira a po~unka no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u mikiŋkiwaj ħakasi to~u no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a po~unka maɾaʦaɬ~ɮaj a saɾo~uŋan, ħaɾo~u patakaraj to~u ɾo~umaʡ ato~u i səraaj, miɾijas to~u kaso~uʡəmət ato~u ʡo~unər a fao~u, o~u mifaɾawaj ko~u kamao~umaħ, ħaɾiʡiʦəp, mafanaʡ a mitino~uo~uaj, miwikwik ato~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~up mifo~utiŋ no~u to~uʡasan. no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan masakiɾaʦ i pakaʡamisaj, ira ko~u sakafanaʡ to~u paħapinaŋ naŋra to~u no~utimo~uɾaj kanataɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ŋaɾəf o~u sakafijawaj a ʡətaɾ, masapatəkaj miħəʦaan o~uja to~u ko~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾiw, ʦaaj ko~u maħawitiɬ~ɮaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. imatiniaj a kanataɾ no~u tajwan (ħaɾo~u ɾanjo~u~u) a jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u *.***% a no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, nika miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj mikiŋkiwan maħapinaŋ, o~u kaɾiwasakan pasajra i timo~uɾan maɾinaħ ko~u rakat o~u naitiniaj i tajwan ko~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan a ɾaɾəŋawan, o~u rakat a maɾinaħ no~u katəɾaŋaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan kaɾiwasakan pasajra i timo~uɾan maɾinaħ ko~u rakat, kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan kaitiraan a maro~uʡ. anini ro~umaro~uma a no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan saʡətaɾ maʦaʦo~uro~uk no~u mo~u~usɾim, kristo~ukiw, tiŋso~ukiw a sərarəʦi ko~u kafijo~uɾ, nano~ujaan o~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u no~u tajwan ʦimiro~uʦo~ukaj ato~u mirajrajaj to~u sərajan ɾəkakawa a po~unka no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan.
S.FORM: == O rakat a malinah notimolan kanatal a sowal no finacadan == O yincuminco no Taywan, sasowalen itini i 17 sici eca ho cimalinahay ko sa'etal lilisay no riyar i Congkuo i 'ayaw, iraay to ko tamdaw maro' itini i Taywan ato tamdaw no ngataay kanatal. Saka o ponka ato sowal o nano notimolan kanatal sowal (Astronesian) caira, imatiniay sifo misetek to nia finacadan ira ko 16 finacadan, halo 'Amis, Atayal, Bunun, Paiwan, Puyuma, Rukai, Saisiyat, Thao, Tsou, Yami , Truku, Kacalan, Sakizaya, Seediq, Hla'alua, Kanakanavu, no Mancin a to'ek o "Hoan" han ko pitahidang, no Dipong a picalap mikowan itiya o Takasako (Takasago) sanay, tayni to ko Kominto a sifo pangangan saan to yincumin i o "Santi-sanpaw/Pinti-sanpaw" sanay pitahidang, onini saheto o piepec pisiiked a pinengneng no itiyaay a mikowan, ikor no 1994 (83) mihecaan pakayni pisa'icel no kapah to syakay onto no yincumin, itiya to mapalasawad ko pisawaco, oya sanpaw sanay mafalic to o "yincumin" a han to ko pitahidang, ta o "Yincuminco" han to ko pitahidang. O notimolan kanatal a sowal no finacadan o kasakilac itini i Taypinyang ato Intuyang ato Asiya a malitosaay kanatal (Tenok timol kanatal ato Malaty kanatal) a finacadan, oya dadahalay riyar ato kanatal paka'amis o Taywan, pakatimol o New Zealand, pakawali tangasa notimolan Amilika kaetip a Easter kanatal, pakaetip kawali no Africa a Madagascar kanatal, tatenokan o Philippines, Malaysia, Indonesia, New Guinea a kanatal, mika awaay ko Australia, o sadadahalay ko kasakilac a finacadan, polong no tamdaw salongan ira ko 3 walwalan no tamdaw, nika 'alomanay masa'opo itini i kawali katimol Asiya sa'etal. Notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan kakahad ko kaledef no sa'etal, kasasiroma no palapatan ato masa patekay to ko mihecaan no likisi masasiroma, ira to ko masasitekeday, kadofahay kasairaira a ponka no notimolan kanatal a sowal no finacadan. Midotoc to mikingkiway hakasi to no tamdamdaw, notimolan kanatal a sowal no finacadan a ponka malacaday a salongan, halo patakaray to loma' ato i seraay, miliyas to kaso'emet ato 'oner a fao, o mifalaway ko kamaomah, hali'icep, mafana' a mitinooay, miwikwik ato mi'adop mifoting no to'asan. Notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan i Taywan masakilac i paka'amisay, ira ko sakafana' to pahapinang nangra to notimolay kanatal a finacadan, ngalef o sakafiyaway a 'etal, masapatekay mihecaan oya to ko kacacofeliw, caay ko mahawitiday a finacadan. Imatiniay a kanatal no Taywan (halo Lanyu) a yincuminco a tamdaw salongan ira ko 54 'ofad no tamdaw, dengan o 0.002% a notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan ko tamdaw, nika midotoc to adihayay mikingkiwan mahapinang, o kaliwasakan pasayra i timolan malinah ko rakat o naitiniay i Taywan ko lalowadan a lalengawan, o rakat a malinah no katelangay notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan kaliwasakan pasayra i timolan malinah ko rakat, kacitodongan kaitiraan a maro'. Anini romaroma a notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan sa'etal macacorok no Muslim, Kristokiw, Tingsokiw a serareci ko kafiyol, nanoyaan o yincuminco no Taywan cimirocokay ato mirayrayay to serayan lekakawa a ponka no finacadan.
S.PHON: == o~u rakat a maɾinaħ no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan == o~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u no~u tajwan, saso~uwaɾən itini i ** siʦi əʦa ħo~u ʦimaɾinaħaj ko~u saʡətaɾ ɾiɾisaj no~u rijar i ʦo~uŋko~u~uo~u i ʡajaw, iraaj to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡ itini i tajwan ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ŋataaj kanataɾ. saka o~u po~unka ato~u so~uwaɾ o~u nano~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ (astro~unəsian) ʦaira, imatiniaj sifo~u misətək to~u nia finaʦaɬ~ɮan ira ko~u ** finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ħaɾo~u ʡamis, atajaɾ, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, paiwan, po~u~ujo~u~uma, ro~u~ukai, saisijat, tħao~u, tso~uo~u~u, jami , tro~u~uko~u~u, kaʦaɾan, saki*aja, səəɬ~ɮi*, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua, kanakanab~vo~u~u, no~u manʦin a to~uʡək o~u "ħo~uan" ħan ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a piʦaɾap miko~uwan itija o~u takasako~u (takasa*o~u) sanaj, tajni to~u ko~u ko~uminto~u a sifo~u paŋaŋan saan to~u jinʦo~u~umin i o~u "santi-sanpaw/pinti-sanpaw" sanaj pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, o~unini saħəto~u o~u piəpəʦ pisiikəɬ~ɮ a pinəŋnəŋ no~u itijaaj a miko~uwan, iko~ur no~u **** (**) miħəʦaan pakajni pisaʡiʦəɾ no~u kapaħ to~u sjakaj o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin, itija to~u mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u pisawaʦo~u, o~uja sanpaw sanaj mafaɾiʦ to~u o~u "jinʦo~u~umin" a ħan to~u ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, ta o~u "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u" ħan to~u ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ. o~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u kasakiɾaʦ itini i tajpinjaŋ ato~u into~u~ujaŋ ato~u asija a maɾito~usaaj kanataɾ (təno~uk timo~uɾ kanataɾ ato~u maɾatj kanataɾ) a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~uja ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaj rijar ato~u kanataɾ pakaʡamis o~u tajwan, pakatimo~uɾ o~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, pakawaɾi taŋasa no~utimo~uɾan amiɾika kaətip a əastər kanataɾ, pakaətip kawaɾi no~u afriʦa a maɬ~ɮa*asʦar kanataɾ, tatəno~ukan o~u pħiɾippinəs, maɾajsia, inɬ~ɮo~unəsia, nəw *o~u~uinəa a kanataɾ, mika awaaj ko~u ao~u~ustraɾia, o~u saɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaj ko~u kasakiɾaʦ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u * waɾwaɾan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, nika ʡaɾo~umanaj masaʡo~upo~u itini i kawaɾi katimo~uɾ asija saʡətaɾ. no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan kakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaɾəɬ~ɮəf no~u saʡətaɾ, kasasiro~uma no~u paɾapatan ato~u masa patəkaj to~u ko~u miħəʦaan no~u ɾikisi masasiro~uma, ira to~u ko~u masasitəkəɬ~ɮaj, kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħaj kasairaira a po~unka no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u mikiŋkiwaj ħakasi to~u no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a po~unka maɾaʦaɬ~ɮaj a saɾo~uŋan, ħaɾo~u patakaraj to~u ɾo~umaʡ ato~u i səraaj, miɾijas to~u kaso~uʡəmət ato~u ʡo~unər a fao~u, o~u mifaɾawaj ko~u kamao~umaħ, ħaɾiʡiʦəp, mafanaʡ a mitino~uo~uaj, miwikwik ato~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~up mifo~utiŋ no~u to~uʡasan. no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan masakiɾaʦ i pakaʡamisaj, ira ko~u sakafanaʡ to~u paħapinaŋ naŋra to~u no~utimo~uɾaj kanataɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ŋaɾəf o~u sakafijawaj a ʡətaɾ, masapatəkaj miħəʦaan o~uja to~u ko~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾiw, ʦaaj ko~u maħawitiɬ~ɮaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. imatiniaj a kanataɾ no~u tajwan (ħaɾo~u ɾanjo~u~u) a jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u *.***% a no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, nika miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj mikiŋkiwan maħapinaŋ, o~u kaɾiwasakan pasajra i timo~uɾan maɾinaħ ko~u rakat o~u naitiniaj i tajwan ko~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan a ɾaɾəŋawan, o~u rakat a maɾinaħ no~u katəɾaŋaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan kaɾiwasakan pasajra i timo~uɾan maɾinaħ ko~u rakat, kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan kaitiraan a maro~uʡ. anini ro~umaro~uma a no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan saʡətaɾ maʦaʦo~uro~uk no~u mo~u~usɾim, kristo~ukiw, tiŋso~ukiw a sərarəʦi ko~u kafijo~uɾ, nano~ujaan o~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u no~u tajwan ʦimiro~uʦo~ukaj ato~u mirajrajaj to~u sərajan ɾəkakawa a po~unka no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan.
